intro.title: Quick Start
intro.p1: Riftbound is a trading card game (TCG) where you choose a Champion, build your army, and battle for control of strategic battlefields.
intro.p2: The goal is simple: be the first to reach **8 points** (or 11 in team games). You earn points by taking control of a Battlefield and maintaining it at the start of your turn.

deckbuilding.title: Deck Building
deckbuilding.p1: Your deck is composed of a **Legend**, which defines which domains (colors) you can use, and units, spells, and gear cards.
deckbuilding.p2: You also have a separate **Rune Deck**, which provides the resources to play your cards each turn.

resources.title: Runes & Energy
resources.p1: Each card has an energy cost and sometimes a domain requirement. You pay these costs using your **Runes**.
resources.p2: Runes can be used in two ways: **Exhaust** (turn sideways to generate 1 temporary energy) or **Sacrifice** (return to the rune deck for more powerful effects).

combat.title: Combat & Domains
combat.p1: Units fight using their **Might** (Combat Power). When units from different players are on the same Battlefield, they automatically enter combat at the end of the turn.

keywords.title: The Heart of Mastery: Keywords
keywords.subtitle: Mastering Keywords is the most important step to becoming a Riftbound master.

vanguard.name: Vanguard
vanguard.desc: This unit starts the game face-up on the central Battlefield.

warded.name: Warded
warded.desc: This unit cannot be targeted by opponent's abilities or spells.

action.name: Action
action.desc: Abilities you can voluntarily activate during your main phase.

repeat.name: Repeat
repeat.desc: Effects that happen multiple times under certain conditions.

ambush.name: Ambush
ambush.desc: Can be played during the opponent's turn or in response to actions.

legendary.name: Legendary
legendary.desc: You can only have one copy of this card in play at a time.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.content:
Your privacy is important to us. This policy explains how we collect and use your data while using Riftbound Deck Manager.

### 1. Data Collection
We collect basic information such as email (when creating an account) and collection data for cross-device synchronization. We do not sell your data to third parties.

### 2. Information Usage
We use your data to personalize your experience, save your decks, and provide system functionalities.

### 3. Cookies and Advertising
We may use cookies to improve navigation and display relevant ads through partners like Google AdSense.

### 4. Security
We employ modern security measures like encryption and Supabase authentication to protect your information.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.content:
By accessing Riftbound Deck Manager, you agree to the following terms:

### 1. Service Usage
This site is a utility tool for Riftbound TCG players. Use must be personal and non-commercial.

### 2. Intellectual Property
Riftbound and all related art are properties of Riftbound TCG / League of Legends. This project is a fan tool with no official affiliation.

### 3. Limitation of Liability
The service is provided 'as is'. We are not responsible for data loss or misinterpreted game rules.

### 4. Modifications
We reserve the right to change these terms at any time to improve the service.
